title: Planning a NAS upgrade? Check out these Seagate IronWolf and BarraCuda hard drive deals at Newegg
excerpt: Check out these Seagate IronWolf and BarraCuda hard drive deals at Newegg
content_html:
If you're looking for fast, dependable storage for a NAS or desktop computer, Seagate has you covered with a number of great brands. IronWolf is built for always-on network storage, while the BarraCuda is a terrific budget choice for everyday PCs.

The Seagate IronWolf 4TB NAS hard drive is currently available for $235.99 at Newegg. Designed specifically for NAS systems, it combines 4TB of CMR storage with a 5400 RPM spindle speed, a generous 256MB cache, and SATA 6Gb/s connectivity.

AgileArray technology, rotational vibration sensors, and support for workloads of up to 180TB per year make it well suited to multi-bay NAS enclosures that stay powered on around the clock.

The 2TB Seagate BarraCuda hard drive costs $139.99, but you can get $10 off by applying coupon code EPF5424. The HDD spins at 7200 RPM, includes a 256MB cache, and offers SATA 6Gb/s connectivity.

Which HDD should you buy?

✅ Buy the 4TB IronWolf if...

If you run a NAS for backups, media streaming, or shared files, the IronWolf is the better investment. Features such as CMR recording, RAID-focused firmware, vibration protection, and three years of Rescue Data Recovery Services are all designed for continuous operation inside multi-drive systems.

See what our expert Mark thought about the larger 8TB model in his recent review.

✅ Buy the 2TB BarraCuda if...

The BarraCuda is aimed more at traditional desktop use rather than network storage, although it can be used in a NAS. Its faster 7200 RPM speed makes it a good choice for storing photos, videos, and large files, while keeping costs lower than high-capacity SSDs.

Why we recommend them

The IronWolf HDD is engineered specifically for NAS environments. It supports continuous 24/7 operation, includes health management features on compatible NAS platforms, and is designed to maintain reliable performance when several drives are working together.

The BarraCuda HDD focuses on versatility and offers plenty of capacity for everyday computing, a healthy 256MB cache, and dependable performance for general-purpose desktops, making it an easy recommendation if you simply need more space.

Take a look at our round up of the best NAS drives.

Price Context & Historical Value

The IronWolf's dedicated NAS features help justify its premium over standard desktop drives, especially if your data is stored in a RAID array or accessed throughout the day. The current price isn't the cheapest however. It was $169.99 at Newegg at the start of July and briefly dipped down to $154.99.

Meanwhile, the BarraCuda delivers excellent value for anyone looking to add affordable high-capacity storage without moving to a more expensive SSD. $129.99 is a good price, although in May it was available for $110, and in April it was just $89.

The Catch: What to know before you buy

These are mechanical hard drives, which makes them great for NAS purposes. Neither can match the speed of an NVMe SSD for booting Windows or launching demanding applications.

The IronWolf is intended for NAS systems, so many of its specialist features provide little benefit in a standard desktop PC. The BarraCuda is more versatile, but it lacks the workload rating and RAID optimizations, which is where the IronWolf shines.

  • Shop all internal desktop hard drives at Newegg

Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

Wayne Williams is a freelancer writing news for TechRadar Pro. He has been writing about computers, technology, and the web for 30 years. In that time he wrote for most of the UK’s PC magazines, and launched, edited and published a number of them too.

content_html_zh:
如果您正在为 NAS 或台式计算机寻找快速、可靠的存储，希捷可以为您提供众多优秀品牌。 IronWolf 专为始终在线的网络存储而构建，而 BarraCuda 是日常 PC 的绝佳预算选择。

希捷 IronWolf 4TB NAS 硬盘目前在 Newegg 上有售，售价为 235.99 美元。 它专为 NAS 系统而设计，将 4TB CMR 存储与 5400 RPM 主轴速度、充足的 256MB 缓存和 SATA 6Gb/s 连接结合在一起。

AgileArray 技术、旋转振动传感器以及对每年高达 180TB 工作负载的支持使其非常适合全天候保持供电的多托架 NAS 机柜。

2TB Seagate BarraCuda 硬盘售价为 139.99 美元，但使用优惠码 EPF5424 可享受 10 美元折扣。 HDD 转速为 7200 RPM，包含 256MB 缓存，并提供 SATA 6Gb/s 连接。

您应该购买哪种硬盘？

✅ 购买 4TB IronWolf 如果...

如果您运行 NAS 来备份、媒体流或共享文件，IronWolf 是更好的投资。 CMR 记录、针对 RAID 的固件、振动保护和三年 Rescue 数据恢复服务等功能均专为多驱动器系统内的连续运行而设计。

看看我们的专家 Mark 在他最近的评论中对更大的 8TB 型号的看法。

✅ 购买 2TB BarraCuda 如果...

尽管 BarraCuda 可以在 NAS 中使用，但它更适合传统桌面使用而不是网络存储。 其更快的 7200 RPM 速度使其成为存储照片、视频和大文件的不错选择，同时保持比大容量 SSD 更低的成本。

为什么我们推荐他们

IronWolf HDD 专为 NAS 环境而设计。 它支持连续 24/7 运行，包括兼容 NAS 平台上的运行状况管理功能，旨在在多个驱动器一起工作时保持可靠的性能。

BarraCuda HDD 注重多功能性，为日常计算提供充足的容量、健康的 256MB 缓存以及通用台式机的可靠性能，如果您只是需要更多空间，那么它是一个简单的推荐。

查看我们对最佳 NAS 驱动器的汇总。

价格背景和历史价值

IronWolf 的专用 NAS 功能有助于证明其优于标准台式机硬盘的优势，特别是当您的数据存储在 RAID 阵列中或全天访问时。 不过目前的价格还不是最便宜的。 7 月初，Newegg 的价格为 169.99 美元，随后短暂跌至 154.99 美元。

同时，BarraCuda 为那些希望添加经济实惠的大容量存储而不转向更昂贵的 SSD 的人提供了卓越的价值。 129.99 美元是一个不错的价格，尽管 5 月份的售价为 110 美元，而 4 月份的价格仅为 89 美元。

要点：购买前要了解什么

这些是机械硬盘，非常适合 NAS 用途。 两者都无法与 NVMe SSD 启动 Windows 或启动要求较高的应用程序的速度相媲美。

IronWolf 专为 NAS 系统而设计，因此它的许多专业功能对标准台式电脑来说几乎没有什么好处。 BarraCuda 更通用，但缺乏工作负载评级和 RAID 优化，而这正是 IronWolf 的亮点。

  • 在 Newegg 购买所有内置台式机硬盘

Wayne Williams 是一名自由职业者，为 TechRadar Pro 撰写新闻。 30 年来，他一直在撰写有关计算机、技术和网络的文章。 在那段时间，他为英国大部分 PC 杂志撰稿，并创办、编辑和出版了其中一些杂志。
